scenario.description: The requested UI feature requires a missing Tauri command.

handling.step: Create the UI component with placeholder/mock data.
Document the expected IPC payload shape.
Explicitly notify the user that backend changes are needed and suggest switching modes.

scenario.description: The requested design conflicts with the macOS HIG tokens defined in the rebuild plan.

handling.step: Alert the user to the deviation from the design system.
Provide the closest matching token-based alternative.
